title: Crumbly Turkish Dates Crumble
description: An earthy and crumbly date-night dish featuring toasted dates, lemongrass stalks, and a sweet and spicy topping suitable for kosher-friendly cooking.

ingredients.name: cedar wood chips or lemongrass stalks (optional)

instructions: Toast dates in a pan until they're soft and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Mix flaxseeds with sugar and set aside for easier handling.
In another bowl, mix almond meal or flour, sesame seeds, butter, and cinnamon powder. Combine well and stir in toasted dates and optional lemongrass.
Press mixture evenly onto the bottom of a baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown. Let cool before serving.
